chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.57 of 2022 Imran Sarwar Versus Abid Ansari & others Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case Dated: 24.04.2024 None present. -.-.- Ever since this appeal was filed appellant either himself or through his counsel never appeared. They were called absent on 11.08.20222 and 03.10.2022 when brief was held for appellant’s counsel followed by absence of appellant and his counsel on 15.12.2022. Today position is same; neither appellant nor his counsel is in attendance. There is no intimation either. Instant First Appeal is according dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
